PowerShell(& ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -c "import anthropic; c = anthropic.Anthropic\(\); print\('client.batches:', hasattr\(c, 'batches'\)\); print\('client.messages.batches:', hasattr\(c.messages, 'batches'\)\); print\('messages.batches methods:', [m for m in dir\(c.messages.batches\) if not m.startswith\('_'\)]\)")
